rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE OW 1996 FAMILY TRUST DATED 5/24/96 AS AMENDED AND RESTATED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Verified Petition For (1) Order Confirming Real Property To Trust; (2) Order Conveying Personal Property To Trust And For 859 Damages; (3) Cancellation Of Instruments; (4) Money Had And Received; (5) Financial Elder Abuse; And (6) Undue Influence
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE OW 1996 FAMILY TRUST DATED 5/24/96 AS AMENDED AND RESTATED
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Appointment Of A Guardian Ad Litem
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, although no proof of service of notice of the amended ex parte petition has been filed and it is unclear how the son has standing to nominate the guardian ad litem. (The pleading form attached to the amended ex parte petition was also verified by the petitioner.) Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.
